description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this black and grey printed tote from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. It's large enough to hold all your essentials, and attractive enough to earn you those appreciative glances!Height: 31 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 10 cmMade of canvas for added styleOne large and roomy main compartment with a small zippered pocket and five smaller pouches Graphic print all overshort handles for snug carrying easeBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long lifeCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
